item.title: IHSG Rebounds in Early July 2026 After Foreign Investors Dumped Rp19.63 Trillion
item.description: IHSG rose 1.19% to 5,986.5 on July 7, 2026 after plunging throughout June 2026. Foreign investors sold Rp19.63 trillion in stocks in June. Read our complete analysis and investment strategies amid the market recovery.

item.title: S&P DJI Puts Indonesia on Watchlist 2027, IHSG Plunges 1.3%
item.description: S&P Dow Jones Indices places Indonesia on 2027 Watchlist with potential downgrade from Emerging Market to Frontier Market. IHSG fell 1.32% to 5,907. Analysis of market impact and Indonesia's stock market outlook.
